spacing_and_layout.detail_page: max-w-6xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 p-6 md:p-10
spacing_and_layout.cards: rounded-2xl p-6 bg-white shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(6,95,70,0.04)] border border-emerald-50
spacing_and_layout.panels: bg-slate-50 rounded-3xl p-6 md:p-8 border border-slate-100

file_upload_dropzone.container_classes: relative group flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-40 px-4 py-8 bg-emerald-50/30 border-2 border-dashed border-emerald-200 rounded-2xl hover:bg-emerald-50/80 hover:border-emerald-400 transition-all cursor-pointer focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-emerald-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2
file_upload_dropzone.icon_classes: w-10 h-10 text-emerald-500 mb-3 group-hover:-translate-y-1 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300
file_upload_dropzone.file_chip_classes: flex items-center justify-between p-3 mt-3 bg-white border border-emerald-100 rounded-xl shadow-sm
file_upload_dropzone.file_thumbnail_classes: w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-emerald-50 flex items-center justify-center text-emerald-600 shrink-0
file_upload_dropzone.micro_interaction: Drag-over state should change border to solid emerald-500 and bg to emerald-100. Smooth ease-out transforms.

form_inputs_and_select.input_classes: flex h-12 w-full rounded-xl border border-emerald-100 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-900 shadow-sm transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:border-emerald-500 focus-visible:ring-4 focus-visible:ring-emerald-500/10 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
form_inputs_and_select.textarea_classes: min-h-[120px] rounded-xl border border-emerald-100 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-900 shadow-sm transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:border-emerald-500 focus-visible:ring-4 focus-visible:ring-emerald-500/10
form_inputs_and_select.select_trigger_classes: flex h-12 w-full items-center justify-between rounded-xl border border-emerald-100 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm shadow-sm ring-offset-background placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-emerald-500/10 focus:border-emerald-500 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

date_picker.trigger_classes: flex h-12 w-full items-center justify-start gap-3 rounded-xl border border-emerald-100 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-left text-sm shadow-sm transition-all hover:border-emerald-300 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-emerald-500/10
date_picker.calendar_classes: p-3 bg-white rounded-2xl border border-emerald-100 shadow-xl

repeatable_links_list.row_classes: flex items-center gap-3 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 p-2 pl-4 rounded-xl focus-within:border-emerald-400 focus-within:ring-4 focus-within:ring-emerald-500/10 transition-all
repeatable_links_list.input_override: flex-1 border-0 bg-transparent shadow-none focus-visible:ring-0 px-0 h-auto text-sm text-slate-800 placeholder:text-slate-400
repeatable_links_list.remove_button: p-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors
repeatable_links_list.add_button: flex items-center justify-center gap-2 w-full py-3 px-4 text-sm font-medium text-emerald-700 bg-emerald-50/50 border border-dashed border-emerald-200 rounded-xl hover:bg-emerald-50 hover:border-emerald-300 transition-all mt-3

detail_page_hero.container_classes: relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl bg-emerald-600 p-8 md:p-10 text-white shadow-lg mb-8
detail_page_hero.texture_overlay: absolute inset-0 opacity-10 mix-blend-overlay bg-cover bg-center pointer-events-none
detail_page_hero.badge_classes: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-md text-xs font-medium text-white border border-white/10
detail_page_hero.title_classes: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold mt-4 mb-2 tracking-tight

work_versions.container_classes: bg-slate-50 rounded-3xl p-6 md:p-8 border border-slate-100 space-y-6 mt-8
work_versions.card_classes: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 border border-emerald-50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow relative overflow-hidden
work_versions.version_badge: absolute top-6 right-6 inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 text-xs font-bold tracking-wider
work_versions.approval_badge: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 text-sm font-medium border border-emerald-100 mt-4

comments_timeline.container_classes: relative space-y-8 before:absolute before:inset-0 before:ml-6 before:-translate-x-px md:before:mx-auto md:before:translate-x-0 before:h-full before:w-0.5 before:bg-gradient-to-b before:from-emerald-100 before:via-emerald-50 before:to-transparent
comments_timeline.avatar_classes: relative z-10 w-12 h-12 rounded-full border-4 border-white shadow-sm ring-1 ring-emerald-50 object-cover
comments_timeline.bubble_classes: relative bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm border border-slate-100 ml-6 md:ml-0 group-hover:border-emerald-100 transition-colors
comments_timeline.composer_classes: flex gap-4 p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 focus-within:border-emerald-300 focus-within:bg-white transition-colors

avatars.description: Male avatar for requester or approver
Female avatar for lead or comments

textures.description: Abstract emerald texture for hero banner overlay (use with mix-blend-overlay and 10-15% opacity)

motion_interactions.hover_states: All buttons and interactive cards must have `-translate-y-[2px]` and `shadow-md` on hover. Use `transition-all duration-200 ease-out`.
motion_interactions.dropzone: Scale upload icon by 110% on hover. On drag over, pulse background slightly.
motion_interactions.focus_states: Replace default outline with `focus:ring-4 focus:ring-emerald-500/10 focus:border-emerald-500` for a soft, premium glow.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text, especially slate-500 or emerald-600, passes APCA/WCAG on white/slate-50 backgrounds.
accessibility.aria: Add `aria-label` to custom dropzones and repeatable field remove buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT change the existing brand primary color (emerald-600). Build around it to make it softer and more premium.
Replace all native file inputs (`<input type='file'>`) with the custom Dropzone recipe provided in `components.file_upload_dropzone`.
Replace native date picker with Shadcn `<Popover>` + `<Calendar>` combo.
For repeatable links, replace the side-by-side input and square '+' button with a vertical list of inputs inside styled rows, and a full-width dashed 'Add Link' button below.
Apply the bento grid spacing logic for the detail page. Group metadata into neat, distinct cards.
Ensure `data-testid` attributes are preserved or added to new components.
